narrative:
Fairview Park-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 947 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
